title: Masked Median Filter
description: Apply an N-D median filter to a volume, but only inside a painted mask; voxels outside the mask keep their original values. Backed by ITK.

parameters.title: Input Volume
parameters.help: Background volume to filter (DICOM, NIfTI, NRRD, MHA, etc.)

parameters.title: Mask Labelmap
parameters.help: Labelmap selecting where to apply the filter (any nonzero label).
